case_title: PATELCO CREDIT UNION VS BAZILE LEE P

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $97.19 FILED BY PATELCO CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT BAZILE LEE P ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-15-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BAZILE LEE P

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATELCO CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAZILE LEE P $97.19 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $97.19, PAYMENTS ARE TO BE DOUBLED TO $20.00 PER MONTH UNTIL PAID IN FULL.(AUG.1ST) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BAZILE LEE P
